title: HIV COMMUNITY SERVICES - 211info
text: BURNS HIV COMMUNITY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential case management independent living services to individuals living with HIV. Offers expense assistance for HIV medications, transportation costs to medical care and case management appointments, insurance premium payments, transitional housing, rent payment assistance, dental care, disease management education, referrals to other agencies for basic needs, employment, and substance abuse treatment. 51 W Washington Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 370-2810 401 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 370-2810 ext 401 Toll-free (844) 370-2810 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Baker, Gilliam, Grant, Harney, Hood River, Malheur, Morrow, Sherman, Umatilla, Union, Wallowa, Wasco, and Wheeler Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Services: Case/Care Management * AIDS/HIV Issues Dental Care Expense Assistance * AIDS/HIV Health Insurance Premium Assistance * AIDS/HIV Independent Living Skills Instruction * AIDS/HIV Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * AIDS/HIV Prescription Expense Assistance * AIDS/HIV Rent Payment Assistance * AIDS/HIV Specialized Information and Referral * AIDS/HIV Issues Transportation Passes * AIDS/HIV Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - CRISIS AND EMERGENCY PREPAREDNESS INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION SERVICES PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - TRANSITION SERVICES REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - CENTERS FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - NEEDLE EXCHANGE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BURNS
